positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, depicting stylized abstract woodland creatures and flora. A central grouping of sleek, stylized deer and rabbits walking through intersecting paths formed by geometric trees and crystalline foliage. The style is vector art meets modern brutalism, featuring clean, sharp silhouettes and bold lines. Composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Limited color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and charcoal gray, utilizing negative space heavily for contrast. Flat graphic design aesthetic, high contrast, crisp lines, 8K print quality, designed for screen printing.
